Got an idea for improving the `minisign` crate? We'd love to hear it!

Please read the [API documentation](https://docs.rs/minisign) first in case the functionality you're after already exists.

A few notes before filing:

- This crate is a library, intended to be used by other applications. Requests for command-line features belong in [rsign2](https://github.com/jedisct1/rsign2).
- The signature format itself is fixed and shared with the [reference C implementation](https://jedisct1.github.io/minisign/). Changes that would break interoperability are out of scope.
- API changes are welcome, but keep in mind that this crate aims to stay small, focused, and dependency-light.
